LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SKINNY LABS INC. D/B/A SPINS' MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL DOCUMENTS IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HAVING FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION, PETITIONER SKINNY LABS, INC.'S "MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL DOCUMENTS IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE" IS GRANTED. SKINNY LABS IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT RECITES THE FACTUAL FINDINGS A COURT IS REQUIRED TO MAKE UNDER CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.550(D). ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Joint Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SKINNY LABS INC.'s Joint Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Writ Of Mandate:

Grant per City's statement of non-opposition filed 8/14/20.

order and judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Petitioner Skinny Labs Inc. D/B/A Spins Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Under Seal Documents In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Amis Pan, Esq. 415-433-1940 of Littler Mendelson P.C. for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SKINNY LABS INC. D/B/A Spins' Motion To File Under Seal Documents In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Respondent City and County of San Francisco having filed a statement of non-opposition, petitioner Skinny Labs, Inc.'s "motion to file under seal documents in support of petition for writ of mandate" is granted. Skinny Labs is to submit a proposed order that recites the factual findings a court is required to make under California Rule of Court 2.550(d).

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
